title: Extension of last date for submission of comments/counter comments on the Consultation Paper on Formulation of a Regulatory Framework for Application-based Linear Television Distribution Services (Including Free Ad-Supported Streaming Television Services)
description: Extension of last date for submission of comments/counter comments on the Consultation Paper on Formulation of a Regulatory Framework for Application-based Linear Television Distribution Services (Including Free Ad-Supported Streaming Television Services) nitinkumar Mon, 05/04/2026 - 12:48 File Press Release No. 58 (523.88 KB) Date Mon, 05/04/2026 - 12:00
